mapper.select: /* 토론 댓글 조회 ForumCmntDAO.forumCmntSelect */ SELECT DSCS_CMNT_ID AS cmntSn , DSCS_ATCL_ID AS atclSn , UP_CMNT_ID AS parCmntSn , CMNT_CTS AS cmntCts , TO_NUMBER(NVL(EMT_TYCD, '0')) AS emoticonNo , DELYN AS delYn , RSPNS_REQYN AS ansReqYn , CMNT_CTS_LEN AS cmntCtsLen FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DSCS_CMNT_ID = #{cmntSn}
